summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Walmart Receipt Generator application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Backend health endpoints (/api/, /api/health)
UPC lookup API with caching (/api/products/lookup/{upc})
Receipt calculation API with correct math (/api/receipts/calculate)
PDF generation API with valid PDF output (/api/receipts/generate-pdf)
Split-screen layout (builder + preview panels)
Store Details form - all fields editable
Add Item functionality with auto-generated UPC
Item entry (Name, UPC, Price) with live preview updates
Tax flag dropdown (X, T, F, O, N) with taxable status changes
Void/Unvoid item toggle with visual feedback
Remove item functionality
Tax rate input with real-time calculation updates
Payment details form - all fields functional
Transaction date/time inputs
Live receipt preview with real-time updates
Accurate subtotal, tax, and total calculations
Reset button clearing all fields to defaults
Barcode display in receipt preview
Client-side PDF generation (html2canvas + jsPDF)
Server-side PDF generation via backend API
UPC lookup integration with loading states
Multiple items handling with correct calculations
Edge cases (empty receipts, malformed requests)
